narrative: Middle East tensions and a sharp crude oil supply shock drive global risk-premium repricing, lifting the dollar as equities slide and WTI surges over 7% — gold lower -2.71%; equities -0.77%; DXY +0.21%; VIX 18.3. The oil shock severely pressures the energy-importing yen, pushing USD/JPY to 162.64 as the 275bp Fed-BoJ OIS carry advantage remains highly insulated. GBP/USD holds firm at 1.3363, supported by a positive CESI (+24 beats) and a neutral 0bp Fed-BoE carry spread. Watch the June FOMC Minutes at 18:00 UTC for policy clues.
